name: estoque-management
description: Sistema de gerenciamento de estoque com Node.js e Express

scripts.seed:demo: node -e "const db = require('./src/config/database'); db.connect().then(async (ok) => { if (!ok) throw new Error('Banco nao conectado'); const seedDemoData = require('./src/utils/seedDemoData'); await seedDemoData(global.db); await db.disconnect(); process.exit(0); }).catch(async (err) => { if (db.disconnect) { try { await db.disconnect(); } catch (_) {} } console.error(err.message || err); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.start:tudo: npm run setup:db && npm run dev
